response:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "IngestData",
      "purpose": "Read data from external source and store in raw_data",
      "behavior": "Reads input source, parses data, writes to raw_data store, logs ingestion",
      "boundary": {
        "in_scope": ["reading source", "parsing", "writing to raw_data", "logging"],
        "out_of_scope": ["transformation", "validation", "export"]
      },
      "preconditions": ["input.action == 'ingest'", "source is accessible"],
      "postconditions": ["raw_data contains ingested records"],
      "guarantees": ["logs ingestion details"],
      "composition_role": "execute",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "input", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with action and source", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "raw_data", "op": "write", "reason": "store ingested records"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "ingest_result", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with success, records_ingested, errors", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def IngestData(input: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [{"variable": "raw_data", "op": "write", "description": "store ingested records"}],
      "data_operations": [{"source_name": "raw_data", "operation_type": "write", "description": "store ingested records"}],
      "requested_capabilities": ["raw_data.write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-001", "description": "raw_data must be writable"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-001", "description": "records are written to raw_data"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "TransformData",
      "purpose": "Apply transformations to raw data and store in processed_data",
      "behavior": "Reads raw_data, applies transformation rules, writes to processed_data, logs transformation",
      "boundary": {
        "in_scope": ["reading raw_data", "transforming", "writing to processed_data", "logging"],
        "out_of_scope": ["ingestion", "validation", "export"]
      },
      "preconditions": ["input.action == 'transform'", "raw_data is not empty"],
      "postconditions": ["processed_data contains transformed records"],
      "guarantees": ["logs transformation details"],
      "composition_role": "execute",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "input", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with action", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [
        {"resource": "raw_data", "op": "read", "reason": "read raw records to transform"},
        {"resource": "processed_data", "op": "write", "reason": "store transformed records"}
      ],
      "outputs": [{"name": "transform_result", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with success, records_transformed, errors", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def TransformData(input: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "raw_data", "op": "read", "description": "read raw records to transform"},
        {"variable": "processed_data", "op": "write", "description": "store transformed records"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "raw_data", "operation_type": "read", "description": "read raw records to transform"},
        {"source_name": "processed_data", "operation_type": "write", "description": "store transformed records"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["raw_data.read", "processed_data.write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-002", "description": "raw_data must be readable"}, {"constraint_id": "C-003", "description": "processed_data must be writable"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-002", "description": "transformed records written to processed_data"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-002"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ValidateQuality",
      "purpose": "Validate records in processed_data and mark valid/invalid",
      "behavior": "Reads processed_data, applies validation rules, updates processed_data with validity flag, logs validation",
      "boundary": {
        "in_scope": ["reading processed_data", "validating", "updating processed_data", "logging"],
        "out_of_scope": ["ingestion", "transformation", "export"]
      },
      "preconditions": ["input.action == 'validate'", "processed_data is not empty"],
      "postconditions": ["processed_data records have validity flag"],
      "guarantees": ["logs validation details"],
      "composition_role": "validate",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "input", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with action", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "processed_data", "op": "read_write", "reason": "read records and update validity flag"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "validate_result", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with success, records_valid, records_invalid, errors", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def ValidateQuality(input: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [{"variable": "processed_data", "op": "read_write", "description": "read records and update validity flag"}],
      "data_operations": [{"source_name": "processed_data", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "read records and update validity flag"}],
      "requested_capabilities": ["processed_data.read", "processed_data.write"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-004", "description": "processed_data must be readable and writable"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-003", "description": "validity flag updated in processed_data"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-003"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ExportResults",
      "purpose": "Export only valid records from processed_data to output",
      "behavior": "Reads processed_data, filters valid records, formats output, logs export",
      "boundary": {
        "in_scope": ["reading processed_data", "filtering valid", "formatting output", "logging"],
        "out_of_scope": ["ingestion", "transformation", "validation"]
      },
      "preconditions": ["input.action == 'export'", "processed_data contains valid records"],
      "postconditions": ["output contains exported data"],
      "guarantees": ["only valid records exported", "logs export details"],
      "composition_role": "execute",
      "call_inputs": [{"name": "input", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with action", "source": "parent input"}],
      "internal_leaf_accesses": [{"resource": "processed_data", "op": "read", "reason": "read records to filter valid ones"}],
      "outputs": [{"name": "export_result", "type": "dict", "description": "JSON with success, records_exported, errors, data", "consumer": "parent"}],
      "signature": "def ExportResults(input: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [{"variable": "processed_data", "op": "read", "description": "read records to filter valid ones"}],
      "data_operations": [{"source_name": "processed_data", "operation_type": "read", "description": "read records to filter valid ones"}],
      "requested_capabilities": ["processed_data.read"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-005", "description": "processed_data must be readable"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-004", "description": "valid records exported to output"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-004"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }
  ],
  "governance_notes": "All children are pure functions with no side effects beyond data store accesses. Resource operations are derived directly from internal_leaf_accesses. No global variables beyond raw_data and processed_data. All data_operations are synchronized with global_vars.",
  "resource_audit": {
    "signature_preservation_detail": "All signatures unchanged from Stage 2.",
    "internal_leaf_mapping_detail": "Each internal_leaf_access maps to a global_var and data_operation with same resource and op.",
    "global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail": "For each child, global_vars and data_operations contain identical entries.",
    "coverage_detail": "All resources (raw_data, processed_data) and operations (read, write, read_write) covered across children.",
    "final_status": "ok"
  }
}
